decision.summary: Beecthor's latest thesis still favors another upside leg first, so the cleanest open slot is the weekly BTC $78k reach market.
decision.rationale: The fresh April 16 transcript keeps the macro path bearish later but explicitly shifts the short-term bias to correction-and-continuation higher while no clear bearish impulse appears. Recent transcripts and summaries all support one more upside leg toward 78k-79k before the larger decline resumes. Binance execution reality at 74228.62 does not support forcing fresh downside exposure: price is close to the lower end of the 24h range after already flushing into support, while the market still has room to rebound. With no open positions, the nearest daily reach line is 76k on April 16, but this late in the UTC session it is too short-dated and too discounted to be the clean conservative expression of the thesis. Within the weekly slot, the nearest reasonable upside target is 78k April 13-19, and after the market-type fix it is the correct nearest weekly reach candidate. Its probability is below the preferred band, but that is a soft filter, and the thesis alignment is strong enough to justify a small early-stage entry.
